summary: Simulation Audit ARS 1000 Module - Complete Testing. All 21 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI elements verified working including list view, create modal, active simulation with clause navigation, evaluation buttons, result view with verdict/KPIs/recommandations, and PDF export.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend simulation_audit.py correctly implements 17 clauses covering all ARS 1000 sections
Score calculation correctly excludes NA clauses from denominator
Verdict logic correctly implemented: FAVORABLE (>=80%, 0 NC maj), FAVORABLE AVEC RESERVES (>=60%, <=2 NC maj), DEFAVORABLE (else)
Recommandations correctly generated for each NC with clause, type, recommandation text, priorite
PDF export uses reportlab with proper styling and includes verdict, KPIs, and recommandations table
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Clause dots (mini indicators) correctly show evaluation status with color coding
Auto-advance to next clause after evaluation works correctly
QuickActionsPanel has 'Simulation Audit' link in ARS 1000 section
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed simulations during testing (TEST_Playwright Simulation, TEST_Verdict FAVORABLE, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simulation Audit module fully tested. 17 clauses cover: Organisation (4.2, 4.3), Gouvernance (5.1, 5.2, 5.3), Planification (6.1), Formation (7.3, 7.4), Production (8.1), Audit (9.2, 9.3), Tracabilite (11-16), Social (12.2, 12.5, 12.8), Environnement (13.2, 13.3). Verdicts working correctly. PDF export functional.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/simulation-audit/clauses: PASSED - Returns 17 clauses with id, section, titre, type, module, recommandation_nc
backend_endpoints.POST /api/simulation-audit/start: PASSED - Creates simulation with 17 empty evaluations
backend_endpoints.GET /api/simulation-audit/list: PASSED - Returns simulations list for cooperative
backend_endpoints.GET /api/simulation-audit/{id}: PASSED - Returns simulation detail with all evaluations
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/simulation-audit/{id}/evaluate: PASSED - Evaluates clause (C/NC/NA) and recalculates score
backend_endpoints.GET /api/simulation-audit/{id}/rapport/p: PASSED - Exports PDF report with verdict, KPIs, recommandations

score_calculation.Real-time recalculation: PASSED - Score recalculated after each evaluation
score_calculation.NA exclusion: PASSED - NA clauses excluded from score denominator

frontend_pages./cooperative/simulation-audit: PASSED - List view with Nouvelle simulation, Reprendre, Resultats, PDF buttons

frontend_interactions.Create simulation modal: PASSED - Opens modal, fills form, starts simulation
frontend_interactions.Active simulation view: PASSED - Shows progress bar, clause dots, current clause card
frontend_interactions.Evaluation buttons: PASSED - Conforme/NC/NA buttons work and auto-advance
frontend_interactions.Clause navigation: PASSED - Prev/Next buttons and dot clicks work
frontend_interactions.Result view: PASSED - Shows verdict card, KPIs, recommandations list
